answer: The Wizard cantrip list in D&D 2024 includes: Acid Splash (projection-acide), Blade Ward (lame-protectrice), Chill Touch (contact-glacial), Dancing Lights (lumiere-dansante), Fire Bolt (trait-de-feu), Friends (amis), Light (lumiere), Mage Hand (main-de-mage), Message (message), Minor Illusion (mineure-illusion), Prestidigitation (prestidigitation), Ray of Frost (rayon-de-givre), Shocking Grasp (saisissement), Spare the Dying (retardement-de-la-mort), and True Strike (frappe-assuree). Note: from training knowledge; verify against catalog.
